/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/arch-system-loadout_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/mainwizard.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/installworker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/pages/welcomepage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/pages/chaoticaurpage.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/arch-system-loadout.dir/src/pages/installpage.cpp.o" -o arch-system-loadout  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Concurrent.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
